title: Best practice when you require reference to multiple column ID from the recipe

posts.author: russel.alfeche (Russel Alfeche)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,
Good day!
Sorry if this is a silly question but is there a best practice that we follow when we want to reference multiple column IDs (more than 5) from a recipe sentence? Is there a limit strictly enforced on the number of input fields of a custom action? Or maybe an alternative approach instead of creating a number of input fields, so that the sentence wouldn’t be that too lengthy?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @russel.alfeche!

As far as I’m aware there isn’t a limit on the number of fields / actions per say, but we do have a character limit in place. The max character limit for a custom trigger / action is 255 for each one. Meaning:

  • Your custom trigger can have up to 255 characters before it fails to save.
  • Your custom action can have up to 255 characters before it fails to save.

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
